title: Cobblemon 3D Pokenavs
description: a resourcepack that adds 3D models to the mod's pokenavs: Cobblemon Pokenav
body:
## Attention, [Cobblemon Pokenav](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav) is required.

I present to you, Cobblemon 3D Pokenavs!

This resource pack adds 3D models to the mod's pokenavs [Cobblemon Pokenav](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokenav), inspired by pokenav plus from pokemon Omega Ruby & Alpha Sapphire

![pokenav model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81a2b95bd68d1362c95130ae48ebbb44c7f19b68.png)

The texture also adds models for the colored versions, pokefinder, fishing navigation and inventory textures for all items.

## ⚠ Attention, Release 4 has different versions for NeoForge and Fabric.
- Only fabric requires [Pommel](https://modrinth.com/mod/pommel-held-item-models) To load in hand models

<details>
<summary>Remodels</summary>

## Pokénav
![pokenav inventory texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdbc1976e8da19b51d7f67294a65fc51b94b9311.png)
![pokenav model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81a2b95bd68d1362c95130ae48ebbb44c7f19b68.png)

## Red Pokéfinder
![red pokefinder inventory texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98e234a7e1bd63220c71708b1d2204254d912732.png)
![pokefinder model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afcceb9955ca953db8555c1dfe73a67afe0b9e9b.png)

## Fishing Nav
![fishing nav inventory texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/972505ac552011a640a4d1918648a5dbb7cbadd1.png)
![fishingnav model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc43ac59bc0749c1133a03ec1a125e8214741597.png)
</details>
